programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Kaders pārdzīvo par Adelīnas aizbraukšanu. Viņš apšauba, ka ir arestējis īsto vainīgo kādā senā lietā. Adelīna atgriežas iecirknī ar jauniem pierādījumiem, kas liecina, ka Kaders izmeklēšanā kļūdījies.

programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Izmeklēšanas laikā kopā ar Džo Kaders atklāj, ka kādai mīklainai vīrieša pazušanai ir saistība ar 70. gados demonstrētu detektīvseriālu. Kaders saņem sitienu pa galvu uzbrukuma laikā. Ironiskā kārtā noziedznieks ir bijis retro seriāla dalībnieks.

programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Kapteinis Kaders Šerifs ļoti mīl savu darbu policijā. Viņš dzīvo tieši pretī policijas iecirknim. Gadiem zināms kā radikālu izmeklēšanas metožu piekritējs, Kaders sastopas ar jauno kapteini, Kadera partneri Adelīnu Briāru. Abi pretpoli, kuri tik ļoti darbā pievelkas, izrādās visai dinamisks policistu pāris! Alžīriešu izcelsmes franču aktieris Abdelhafids Metalsi televīzijā strādā kopš 2000. gadu sākuma, un šarmantais kapteinis Kaders ir viņa līdz šim spilgtākā loma.

programme.title: Šerifs
programme.desc: Kapteinis Kaders Šerifs ļoti mīl savu darbu policijā. Viņš dzīvo tieši pretī policijas iecirknim. Gadiem zināms kā radikālu izmeklēšanas metožu piekritējs, Kaders sastopas ar jauno kapteini, Kadera partneri Adelīnu Briāru. Abi pretpoli, kuri tik ļoti darbā pievelkas, izrādās visai dinamisks policistu pāris! Alžīriešu izcelsmes franču aktieris Abdelhafids Metalsi televīzijā strādā kopš 2000. gadu sākuma, un šarmantais kapteinis Kaders ir viņa līdz šim spilgtākā loma.

programme.title: Aizliegtais paņēmiens
programme.desc: Lai uzzinātu par kāda notikuma patiesajiem apstākļiem vai iesaistīto personu nodomiem, raidījuma "Aizliegtais paņēmiens" komanda informācijas iegūšanai izmanto visdažādākos izmeklējošās žurnālistikas paņēmienus un žanrus – eksperimentus, testus, provokācijas, padziļinātus pētījumus, arī anonīmas intervijas. Žurnālisti padziļināti pēta un skatītājiem atklāj sociālpolitiskus tematus, kas ne vienmēr tiek izcelti citos medijos. Raidījums atklāj un atmasko, atsevišķos gadījumos sauc pie atbildības iesaistītās personas, norāda uz likumu nepilnībām, aicina mainīt pastāvošo kārtību, ja tā ir pretrunā sabiedrības interesēm. Raidījumu vada LTV Ziņu dienesta žurnālists Guntis Bojārs.

programme.title: Pasaules kausa atlases spēle basketbolā. Studija
programme.desc: Otra spēle ar Polijas izlasi šīs nedēļas nogalē, tikai šī jau būs izbraukumā. Ar šo cīņu sāksies turnīra otrais aplis. Basketbola studijā kopā ar ekspertiem Reinis Ošenieks analizēs abu komandu sniegumu iepriekšējā spēlē šajā piektdienā Rīgā. Skaidrs, ka nekādu noslēpumu vairs nebūs, jo komandu sastāvi faktiski būs tie paši, kas pirms divām dienām, tikai treneri var mēģināt nedaudz savādāku spēles taktiku. Latvijai šis cikls ir iesācies smagi, ar negaidītu zaudējumu ievadā Nīderlandei savās mājās. Polijas izlase mūsdienās ir gana spēcīga, spēlētāji ir fiziski lieliski sagatavoti un raženi augumā, Eiropas čempionāta finālturnīrā pērn poļi bija 6. vietā, 2022. gadā - pat ceturtie.

programme.title: FIBA Pasaules kausa basketbolā Eiropas atlase. Latvija – Polija
programme.desc: Trešā oficiālā spēle šajā turnīrā, un trešā jaunā galvenā trenera Sito Alonso vadībā Latvijas izlasei. Spāņu treneris jau atzinis, ka atlases cikla sākums ir sarežģīts, jo savā laukumā piedzīvots zaudējums pret Nīderlandi. Nu vairs nav, kur atkāpties, un jāņem punkti no poļiem. No pirmās kvalifikācijas kārtas nākamajā gan tiks trīs no četrām komandām (grupā: Latvija, Polija, Nīderlande, Austrija). Ļoti svarīgi būs arī iegūtie punkti, kas nāks līdzi nākamajā kārtā, kur jau būs daudz spēcīgāki pretinieki. Mērķis ir viens - kvalificēties Pasaules kausa finālturnīram 2027. gadā Katarā. Novembrī gan Latvijai bija problēmas ar sastāvu vairāku iemeslu dēļ (veselības problēmas, netikšana no saviem klubiem), nevarēja palīdzēt vairāki svarīgi spēlētāji, bet ar to jārēķinās. Polija atlases cikla pašā sakumā savās mājās pārspēja Austriju un otrajā cīņā izbraukumā pašā galotnē uzvarēja arī Nīderlandi. Polijas līderis ir naturalizētais amerikānis Džeriks Hārdings, kas ikdienā spēlē Lietuvā, Viļņas "Rytas", tāpat bīstami ir Mateušs Poņitka un Mihals Sokolovskis.

programme.title: Bez elpas
programme.desc: Seriāls stāsta par Lielbritānijas mediķu darbu Covid-19 pandēmijā. Ebija Hendersone ir zinoša un pieredzējusi ārste, kas prasmīgi vada savus kolēģus. Kad slimnīcā ierodas pirmie Covid-19 pacienti, drīz vien inficējas arī ārsti un pārējais medicīnas personāls. Atklājas, ka trūkst individuālo aizsarglīdzekļu un medikamentu. Politiķi un vadošie veselības aprūpes speciālisti apgalvo, ka panikai nav pamata, un vilcinās noteikt valstī ierobežojumus. Ebija kopā ar kolēģiem cenšas glābt pacientus postošajā pandēmijā, kas pārslogojusi krīzei nesagatavoto veselības aprūpes sistēmu.

programme.title: Globalizācijas un mēs
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ražots Vācijā
programme.desc: Deutsche Welle žurnāls.

programme.title: Ielas garumā
programme.desc: Turpinām stāstu par Paula Stradiņa slimnīcu, bet šoreiz no Ventspils ielas puses, kur atrodas arī studiju korpuss ar profesora Paula Stradiņa vārdā nosaukto auditoriju, bet otrpus ielai - viņa celtā māja ar plašo dārzu. Uzzināsim, kā ritējusi dzīve šai mājā, kurā viesojušās izcilas kultūras personības un kolēģi, bet leģendām līdzīgi, jautri stāsti saistās ar Filo fon Hāgensbergu un Niksonu Gar Ventspils ielu stiepjas arī slimnīcas jaunais korpuss, no kura pabeigta tikai puse, bet galvenā ēkas daļa, ko tik ļoti gaida viss slimnīcas kolektīvs, joprojām iekonservēta un tās liktenis - strīdu, tiesvedību un neziņas miglā tīts.

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Finālā viss kļūst nopietni, katrs lēmums var nest gan uzvaru, gan zaudējumu. Spēlēs jaunie zinātnieki; kapteiņi - ķīmiķis Atis Jēkabsons un mežzinātnieks Oskars Krišāns. Atis Jēkabsons - komandas kapteinis ar maģistra grādu ķīmijā. Maģistra studiju laikā ieguvis Kristapa Morberga stipendiju, studiju semestri aizvadījis Norvēģijas Arktiskajā universitātē Tromsē. Ikdienā ir Organiskās sintēzes institūta menedžeris, asistents. Piedalās klātienes viktorīnās, spēlē volejbolu entuziastu līgā. Latvijas sporta "dīvāna eksperts". Anna Ņikitjuka - doktora grāds ķīmijā, kas iegūts Latvijas Universitātē. Organiskās sintēzes institūta vadošā pētniece, regulāri apmāca un vada jaunos studentus un skolēnus ķīmijas pasaulē. Ar visu sirdi atbalsta deju kolektīvu "Zelta sietiņš", tamborē somas, nodarbojas ar zumbu un cenšas gatavot jauno paaudzi visam labajam. Elīna Līdumniece - zinātnes doktora grāds dabaszinātnēs, par promocijas darbu apbalvota ar Latvijas Zinātņu akadēmijas Solomona Hillera vārdā nosaukto balvu, ir Organiskās sintēzes institūta pētniece. Brīvajam laikam ir rokdarbi, lepojas ar plašu augu kolekciju, aizraujas ar rogainingu. Entuziastiski seko līdzi latviešu pārstāvētajiem sporta veidiem. Kopā ar kapteini jau 10 gadus strādā vienā laboratorijā. Oskars Krišāns - komandas kapteinis ar doktora grādu mežzinātnē, pēcdoktorants institūtā "Silava" "Meža selekcijas un kokaugu adaptācijas" pētniecībā. Šobrīd aizņemts ar pētījumu par vēja izraisītajiem bojājumiem priežu mežaudzēs. Darba rutīnu, kas lielākoties ir pie datora, cenšas atjaukt ar svaigu gaisu, kam lieliski noder pētījuma datu ievākšana dabā. Allaž lielā cieņā ir distanču slēpošana, medīšana un kaut vai vienkārša nesēdēšana istabā. Laura Ķēniņa - doktora grāds mežzinātnē. Šobrīd pētījumu lokā ir vecās mežaudzes institūtā "Silava". Laura ļauj sev izzināt dabas procesus, grib būt kustībā, tāpēc darbs mežzinātnē sagādā gandarījumu. Bieži mērījumus mežā veic kopā ar abiem dēliem. Dēlu interese pamudināja organizēt vasaras nometnes bērniem "Mežā ar zinātnieci". Sirdslietas ir arī tautasdejas un medības. Kristaps Makovskis - ekonomikas zinātņu doktors. Institūtā "Silava" strādā "Meža atjaunošanas un ieaudzēšanas" pētnieciskajā virzienā, veic pētījumu par ātraudzīgo koku stādījumu ietekmi uz klimatu un ekonomiku. Mežsaimnieks trešajā paaudzē, vectēvs un abi vecāki strādājuši meža nozarē. Pētniecībā patīk, ka katra diena ir savādāka, iespējams vienu dienu pavadīt pie datora, otru - mežā. Kopš bērnības bijis zinātkārs, vienmēr interesējušas jaunas lietas.

programme.title: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma
programme.desc: Latvijas Sirdsdziesma ir sirsnīgi muzikāls raidījums, kurā tiek atspoguļotas tautā vispopulārākās latviešu mūzikas dzīves norises šī vārda visplašākajā nozīmē.

programme.title: UFO Europe: Untold Stories
programme.desc: 8th September 1970: the height of the Cold War. American pilot Capt. Schaffner is scrambled to intercept an unidentified target over the North Sea and disappears without trace. When his aircraft is discovered, the cockpit is closed but his body has vanished. In 2004, in a small fishing village on the island of Sicily, a series of unexplained incidents take place… one after another. A fisherman witnesses a mysterious, unidentified, red light that flies up from the water. Other local residents also report UFOs sightings in the area. But the UFO sightings were just the start of a bizarre and frightening set of events that took place in and around the village of Canneto di Caronia. RAF Pilot, Sargent Hughes encounters an UFO on a routine training flight over Germany in 1952. Despite flying with three other planes he is the only one to witness the object. His colleagues mock him and dismiss his sighting as a flight of fancy, as a joke they paint a flying saucer on his aeroplane saying "Saucer Sam".

programme.title: UFO Europe: Untold Stories
programme.desc: On August 18, 1985, 4 civilian pilots are flying back from an air show when they notice a silver missile shaped object coming towards them and passing underneath their plane. They turn around and try to keep up with the object but it is too fast for them. They report the sighting, but no conclusive answers were found. On January 8th, 1981, a man working in a field reported seeing a strange object land in his field. Shortly afterwards, the object took off. He noticed marks on the ground where he thought the object had landed and decided to report what he had seen. Despite investigations, no definite explanation was reached. From late 1989 to Spring 1990, thousands of people across Belgium reported sightings of 3 lights in a triangular formation, moving across the sky. The lights were seen over cities and in the countryside, and even sparked a scramble of Air Force F-16 jets to investigate.

programme.title: Chasing UFOs
programme.desc: This time Ryder, Ben, and James head to the Colorado Rockies to inspect claims of animal mutilations and reports of abductions. These instances take place San Luis Valley, a town with decades of history involving UFO sightings. Residents are eager to share their encounters with the team - everything from hovering green lights to speeding saucers. After spotting a few questionable lights in the night sky, Ryder, Ben, and James meet with local ranchers to learn further about the animal mutilations. They also meet a man who claims he was abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. Unraveling the complex mystery is a painstaking process that takes months—and sometimes years—of detective work. The twisted wreckage at the crash site tells part of the story; investigators can use it to learn about the final seconds of a flight and rule out mechanical failures. The flight data and cockpit voice recorders are critical, but they dont always reveal what happened. It almost always takes a tragic combination of factors to bring down an airplane.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: With airplane travel becoming increasingly popular in a shrinking world and millions of passengers journeying this way every day, it is helpful to be aware of the potentail dangers involved. This show presents remarkable stories of some of the most catastrophic accidents in aviation history and investigates the causes of the accidents, what effect they had on the industry and the steps taken to ensure that they dont happen in the future. Each stand-alone episode features compelling re-enactments, expert analysis and interviews with those involved. The explanations for the accidents range from the explosive power of decompression to problems with autopilots and computerised control systems to air traffic control errors.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Plane Crash Recreated Plane Crash Recreated 10 x 60 As passengers, every time we board an aeroplane, we place our trust in the pilot, airline and the aircraft manufacturer and while flying remains the safest form of travel, accidents still happen. Plane Crash Recreated will explain and investigate the worlds most infamous plane crashes. Using survivor stories, expert interviews and black-box data, we will experience the final harrowing moments on board these notorious flights. But could the outcome have been different? Using a team of highly skilled test pilots and our own cutting edge flight simulator, we show you the extreme pressure inside the cockpit. When faced with failure, our military, commercial, aerobatic and test-pilots will need to make split-second life-or-death decisions. How will their vastly different training affect their outcome? And with the benefit of hindsight, what would they do differently?

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Locked in the depths of winter, Margot hits the trapping trail - on the hunt for precious fur-bearing resources; Determined to thrive in the frigid Northwoods, Billy tries his hand at building a hot water heating system. Matty makes some serious "comfort" upgrades to his recently expanded Newfoundland abode; And taking a break from cabin construction, Emilie and Gilbert turn their attention to securing a traditional and essential food source.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Spring has arrived and Margot heads out, in search of bear - but ends up face to face with an even more formidable force of nature. Billy takes advantage of warmer weather and begins work on some much-needed cabin upgrades. Matty goes full "hillbilly" with his plans for the ultimate backwoods deep freeze; And Emilie and Gilbert get to work on a "Shabotwan" - a traditional structure they to hope to finish before the spring goose hunt begins.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. In this episode we learn just how many ways there are to embarrass, injure and humiliate yourself when BASE jumping, pulling a BMX nose wheelie and showing off your sword skills.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. Each week we show between 50 and 60 clips of misadventure - ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes. Each episode will feature several themes such as motorbike drifting, wakeboarding or attempting to fly drones. Clips are paused, re-wound, and re-played as we analyse exactly what went wrong and why. Richard Hammond explains the physics, chemistry and biology at play, by presenting forensic detail to explain the stupidity that resulted in failure. Hell study everything from acceleration to aero dynamics, fluid pressure to combustion and human anatomy to flammability. This is misadventure explained. This is The Science of Stupid.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz have taken on the task of restoring a 1974 Mk1 Ford Capri. Its owner, 53 year old Helen, is a lifelong petrol head who bought her dream car nearly 8 years ago with the plan to strip it down and do full nut and bolt rebuild. However after a terrible accident Helen was left with heart problems and in constant pain from severe rheumatoid arthritis the restoration of her Capri was put on hold. Daughter Rebecca and son Rob called Car SOS help put their mothers car back on the road and the gleam back in her eye.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on 63 year old Kels 1962 Triumph TR4. Kel bought his beloved British roadster back in the 1970s and it became the car of his youth, he simply couldnt be parted from it - even when it finally gave up the ghost and ended up in storage - it was never far from his thoughts. His planned restoration sadly ground to a halt when a series of family tragedies and a brutal stroke that robbed him of most of his vision - meant that any plans to get his car back on the road were dashed. Tim and Fuzz steal the car away but quickly realise that theyve taken on one of the biggest jobs in Car SOS history.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Northern Ireland to take on a 1972 Generation 1 Toyota Celica a rare Japanese coupe that has seen better days. The cars owner is 50 year old Celica obsessive Noel who bought the car with a plan to restore it and use it as his daily driver. However Noels whole life took a turn for the worse when he suffered a series of spinal injuries that lost him his job, his home and put his dream car restoration on hold for good.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Master mechanics Fuzz Townshend and parts-blagging petrol head Tim Shaw are back for a brand new season of the fan favourite show Car S.O.S. The comedy duo have their work-cut out as they embark on more undercover missions rescuing classic cars and returning them in a surprise reveal to their much deserving owners. This season starts with a exhaust bang, as Tim and Fuzz are on a special mission to rescue a unique classic racing car and reunite it with a true racing legend...Sir Stirling Moss! But this 1962 Austin Healy Sebring Sprite, that once raced in a team that included Sir Stirling Moss, isnt in a fit state. But the guys have a plan to get this car back on the racetrack and Sir Stirling Moss back in the driving seat. Fuzz begins work in the garage whilst Tim goes in search of the original engine, and also finding time along the way to have a sit down with the racing legend himself. Will the Sprite be ready in time for Sir Stirling Moss to take it out for a spin? The guys also come across a supercar thats begging to be taken back to the swinging 60s, the Jaguar E-type. But the cars owner Mick is suffering from osteoporosis and has lost all hope that his beloved car will ever be back to its full glory. But Tim and Fuzz are working with Micks family in secret to restore the car and give Mick a brilliant surprise. But when they discover its a back to metal restoration this car looks like its going to be more of a head-ache than a head-turner. Other cars festering away waiting for the guys attention are Tims all-time favourite: the Audi Quattro Turbo, the 3 wheeled 1934 Morgan F4, a retro 1982 Mk1 GTI and a 1995 Nissan Skyline GTR. So start up those engines, as Tim and Fuzz return this month for the ultimate car show with a heart.

programme.title: Lost in the Jungle
programme.desc: A deadly plane crash deep in the Colombian rainforest strands four young siblings to survive 40 unimaginable days alone. For the first time, the children tell their story, revealing their epic fight to stay alive as a dramatic rescue mission unfolds around them, uniting Indigenous trackers and the military in a race against time in this gripping true story of survival, courage and hope.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Gladiators: Warriors of the Ancient World
programme.desc: Emperor Commodus shocks Rome by casting aside tradition and becoming a gladiator. Over 14 days of extravagant games, he slays wild beasts, spars with helpless opponents, and indulges his fantasy of godhood - dressed as Hercules, demanding adoration. Behind the spectacle lies growing discontent: the Senate scorned, the treasury drained, and power abused, as he trains as a gladiator in his country estate. When Commodus plans to inaugurate the new year from the gladiators barracks, his inner circle panics. Poisoned by his mistress Marcia and strangled by his trainer Narcissus, Commodus dies; a far cry from the hero he imagined. His death sparks civil war, ushering in the Severan dynasty. His legacy is condemned, and Commodus remains one of the most bizarre figures in Roman history, an emperor who tried to rule from the arena, not the throne.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru and Brazil
programme.desc: This season features four episodes each at two of Latin Americas biggest airports: Lima, Perus Jorge Chavez and Brazils S?o Paulo-Guarulhos. Police are on high alert. Their main challenges: illegal immigration and the trafficking of cocaine. From hidden compartments and ingested capsules to fake documents, officers work 24/7 to protect their borders and stop criminals in their tracks. Watch the action from behind the scenes.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Lima, Perus airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest threat: cocaine smuggling. A US citizen is caught with cocaine - and her story doesnt add up. A woman with cocaine in her suitcase comes clean and a police sting nets another suspect. A Japanese karaoke star is carrying more than music. A carrier implicates her mom. A false positive.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Turkish Airlines Flight 1951 was less than a mile from the runway at Amsterdam Schiphol Airport when it catastrophically crashed on 25 February 2009. The aircraft broke into three pieces on impact, killing nine passengers and crew and all three pilots. A faulty radio altimeter was the initial catalyst in a chain of errors that led to the horrific crash. In this episode, survivors tell their story of escaping from the wreckage of what should have been a normal commute home to Amsterdam..

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: The simplest mistakes are at the heart of some of the worst airline accidents, and while commercial pilots undergo hundreds of hours of training and testing, even experienced pilots can make deadly rookie errors. A botched takeoff in Buenos Aires kills 60 people and the cause stuns investigators. Just two months after 9/11, American Airlines Flight 587 crashes in Queens, New York, igniting fears that America is once again under attack. And, when Continental Airlines 3407 stalls above Buffalo, the flight crews baffling reaction proves fatal.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Drawing the attention of the entire world, three fatal design flaws put air crash investigators in a storm of controversy. When one of former race car driver Niki Laudas planes nosedives into a Thai jungle, a one-in-a-million failure reveals a weak spot in every Boeing 767. A piece of the plane blows off a Turkish Airlines DC-10 causing the most catastrophic mid-air emergency of its time. And, a risky test flight is the only way to uncover the startling truth about what brought down Atlantic Southeast Airlines Flight 2311.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Angkor: Ancient Laos Revealed
programme.desc: An international team of archaeologists investigate a hoard of priceless ancient treasure discovered in the southeast Asian nation of Laos. Their mission takes them to temple sites in the jungle. Aerial scanning technology targets new areas for excavation where astonishing new discoveries are made as they as they explore the origins of the civilisation that built the great city of Angkor.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Angkor: Ancient Laos Revealed
programme.desc: A team of archaeologists investigate a priceless hoard of ancient treasure discovered in Laos. Their quest takes them to temple sites in the southeast Asian jungle as they try to find out who the stunning treasure belonged to and what it was used for. Astonishing new discoveries of gold and human remains open a window into the early years of the civilisation that built the great city of Angkor.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Shrouded by mystery, the Lost Treasures of Egypt clears the sand away from your eyes in revealing the secrets of this Ancient Civilisation. From the Valley of Kings to the Pyramids of Giza, we uncover hidden tombs and foretell the stories of ruling pharaohs through the artefacts, that we find along the way. Following the excavations of international experts, we unearth historical context at various archaeological sites. At the end of this series, you should be enlightened with numerous Egyptian theories such as "mummification" and the Curse of the Afterlife. With royalty as Tutankhamun and Cleopatra, we explore the impacts these figures had at the time and the lasting dynasty they have since left behind, for modern Egypt.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt
programme.desc: Shrouded by mystery, the Lost Treasures of Egypt clears the sand away from your eyes in revealing the secrets of this Ancient Civilisation. From the Valley of Kings to the Pyramids of Giza, we uncover hidden tombs and foretell the stories of ruling pharaohs through the artefacts, that we find along the way. With royalty as Tutankhamun and Cleopatra, we explore the impacts these figures had at the time and the lasting dynasty they have since left behind, for modern Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of Christs Tomb: Explorer Special
programme.desc: In this 60 minute Nat Geo Explorer Special, we follow world leading experts on a quest to unlock the mysteries surrounding the Tomb of Christ. At the heart of the story a team of leading scientists use the latest scientific techniques to restore the edicule housing the tomb. Scientific tests indicate the remnants of the tomb dates to 4th century - a discovery that could revolutionise what we know about the tomb of Christ.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Ignoring common sense and reason, people continue to believe in a host of supposed "supernatural phenomena". In a brand new series, National Geographic Channel exposes the myths and malarkey behind these enduring modern-day tales of the unexpected.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: He terrorized the streets of Londons East End for three months in the autumn of 1888. He did this by killing, and then butchering, five women… at least. This brief murder spree earned the killer the grand daddy of all nicknames. That name, and the grotesque way he dispatched his victims has made Jack the Ripper the most notorious serial killer of all time. But no one knows who he was. In the years since the Ripper plied his grisly trade, the search for his identity has practically become a cottage industry. And its still going on. But is the search getting any closer to the truth? Some people believe the answer is yes. Crime writer Patricia Cornwell has peaked the worlds interest, and animosity, with her new book on the Rippers identity. Like almost everyone who has studied Jack the Ripper, Cornwell has a theory about who he was. The evidence she has amassed points to a prominent British artist named Walter Sickert, who was 28 at the time of the murders, and seemed to take an unusual interest in them. Sickerts artwork is macabre, his relationship with women dubious, and his childhood ripe for Freudian analysis. But can any of this prove he was a serial killer of prostitutes? For this, Cornwell points to the largest body of physical evidence remaining in the Ripper case: the hundreds of letters written to police during the time of the murders, supposedly by the murderer himself. Cornwell believes the letters tell a story - not just through their words, but also in the way those words were formed, the paper they were written on, and the sketches in the margins. She believes some of the letters are the work of Walter Sickert, and well talk to the paper and art conservators and handwriting analysts who are scouring the letters for clues. Meanwhile, other theories about the Rippers identity abound. We visit the murder sites with Ivor Edwards, a professional criminal turned amateur sleuth, who believes Jack the Ripper was a black magic occultist. Edwards reveals a pattern to the crimes that he believes incriminates suspect Robert Donston Stephenson, who may have killed his victims at strategic points on a map in order to desecrate the Christian cross. If Edwards theory sounds far-fetched, it isnt the first. There is also the Freemason angle - pointing to similarities between the ritualistic nature of the murders and ancient Masonic rites. And conspiracy theories flourish, even including the royal family. Can any of the theories hold true? Was Jack the Ripper an iconic artist, a black magic occultist, a member of the royal family, or just an anonymous ""Jack Doe"", whose name is lost to history? Ripperologists, forensic psychologists, crime experts and scientists investigate the clues in search of the Rippers identity.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: The Amber Room is one of the worlds most valuable lost art treasures. Stolen by the Nazis and kept in a castle on the Baltic coast, it vanished in the brutal last months of the war. Today the new discovery of a shipwreck holding a large secret cargo leads explorers to the heart of the mystery, and reveals a forgotten tragedy of 1945: the largest sea evacuation in history, dwarfing Dunkirk in size.

programme.title: Plane Crash Recreated
programme.desc: Lion Air Flight 610 was just 13 minutes into flight from Jakarta, Indonesia, when it plunged into the sea on 29 October 2018. This was the first fatal aviation accident for the 737 MAX, killing all 189 people on board. Just five months later, tragedy struck again on 10 March 2019, when the 737 Max serving Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302, crashed approximately six minutes after takeoff from Ethiopia, again killing all passengers and crew. What followed was an intense investigation into what caused these two devastating crashes. In this episode former NTSB investigators talk us through how these tragedies could have been avoided..

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: The show that combines cold hard science with some of the craziest, most spectacular and painful user generated clips ever recorded is back for a third season. Richard Hammond introduces a host of new mishaps featuring brave, if misguided individuals from around the world and then explains the science behind their failure and humiliation with the use of bespoke animations and super slo-mo cinematography. Each week we show between 50 and 60 clips of misadventure - ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes. Each episode will feature several themes such as motorbike drifting, wakeboarding or attempting to fly drones. Clips are paused, re-wound, and re-played as we analyse exactly what went wrong and why. Richard Hammond explains the physics, chemistry and biology at play, by presenting forensic detail to explain the stupidity that resulted in failure. Hell study everything from acceleration to aero dynamics, fluid pressure to combustion and human anatomy to flammability. This is misadventure explained. This is The Science of Stupid.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: On this episode of Food Factory USA: Discover how to make more than half a million delicious Egg McMuffins every day, from English muffins to perfectly formed fried eggs; find out what it takes to become a professional oyster farmer and shucker; and visit the birthplace of Americas top-selling kosher wine.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: On this episode of Food Factory USA: What started as a one-man labor of love has grown into a massive hot-sauce movement, and empire; discover the secret of delicious POM Wonderful pomegranate juice; and at this California factory, each and every pork tamale is hand-wrapped, steamed, and x-rayed.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: With over a million people passing through Dubai International Airport each week, keeping passengers on the move is an increasingly difficult challenge for airport staff. Ultimate Airport follows engineers narrowly averting a crisis in the 55 mile (90 km) baggage system; rookie cabin crew find out if they have what it takes to fly, and the construction team behind the new concourse feel the heat as more than 200 volunteers test whether its ready to be used by the public.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: In an airport where time is money, a routine tail-fin repair on a $208 million dollar A330 jet hangs in the balance; two trainee Airside Operations Controllers have to guide multi-million dollar aircraft precisely to their parking stands; and with the airport near full capacity handling 57 million passengers a year, the new $3.2 billion concourse is trialed to test if its on schedule to receive 15 million new passengers and 33 of the worlds biggest passenger jets - the mighty $389 million dollar Airbus A380.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Much as technology leaps forward during times of war, the Ebola outbreak that began in 2014 is forcing medical science to evolve as quickly as the virus its fighting. This horror is provoking a revolution that may give birth to a world virtually free of pathogens. Scientists and medical practitioners working at the front lines of disease prevention and control are finding breakthrough ways to fight pandemic viruses.

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Chances are you either know, or you are, a cyborg: a person who is aided or enhanced by embedded technology, such as artificial limbs or pacemakers. But advances in science are taking us beyond replacement parts and into a new realm. They are expanding the range of our senses and changing the nature of the human body and mind.

programme.title: Inside Melbourne Airport
programme.desc: Dangerous weapons concealed in luggage test airport security. Paramedics rush to treat a passenger suspected of having a stroke. A large group of VIPs require special attention, and a secret world beneath the terminals is revealed for the first time. Elsewhere, the hunt is on for the perfect aviation photograph.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport workers undertake true detective work to trace the owner of a duffel bag brimming with old family photos. A woman searches for Christmas decorations that are part of a family gifting tradition. In Tampa, the lost and found department donates items to a local womens shelter, including a $700 purse. In New Orleans, a young man loses his wallet upon arriving for a college tour.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Three real world disasters forensically analysed and recreated in astonishing detail from expert analysis and all the evidence. How did the nuclear reactor at 3 Mile Island meltdown? How did a small truck fire in the Mt Blanc road tunnel become a lethal inferno? How did the seven year old Sampoong department store in South Korea collapse onto hundreds of shoppers?

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Disasters can strike anywhere, anytime. To find out why, expert analysis of the available evidence is used to recreate real world disasters in cutting edge 3D graphics. We can dissect them, peel back the layers, even freeze time to reveal a disasters hidden and surprising causes – a paperwork error, a bad glue job, changing a restaurant opening hours. Whatever it is, Disaster Autopsy will uncover it.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. As well as exploring spectacular archive, illustrating the full toll these disasters can take, well dig into the science behind each event, shining a light on the most fascinating elements and giving an understanding on how and why these events occur.

programme.title: The Truth Behind
programme.desc: Atlantis, the legendary island believed to have sunk beneath the waves thousands of years ago, has puzzled the academic community for generations. Though many sites have been put forward, the Atlantis described by the philosopher Plato remains a mystery. The Truth Behind Atlantis aims to dive into the murky depths of the controversies that surround the island, sifting through historical accounts, scientific experiments and academic opinion. Its a journey that takes us to the tropical Bahamas, Miami, Santorini and to an archaeological site on Crete, as we untangle the past to discover the real story of Atlantis.

programme.title: Ancient X Files
programme.desc: In eastern Turkey is an archaeological site that has the potential to change academic thinking of the dawn of civilisation. Gobekli Tepe is a series of giant standing stones constructed some 12,000 years ago. They defy explanation as they predate any known civilisation with the knowledge to create such a thing. Man at that time is believed to have been hunter gathering, but the stones are covered with intricately detailed carvings, and demonstrate an unexplainable level of organization. Could they represent the beginnings of the first civilised society and the birth of religion? Also in this episode, brutally maimed bodies discovered in the muddy landscape of Ireland.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Making a routine journey from Berlin, Crossair Flight #3597 is on its final approach to Zurich. It is one of the last planes scheduled to land. But just minutes before landing the pilots cannot find the runway. They decide to abort the maneuver and apply full power to all four engines in order to get their jet to climb. But they are too late. The aircraft clips the treetops below and crashes into a hillside. Investigators comb through the wreckage, and the data from the planes black boxes. But they would only solve the riddle of Crossair Flight 3597 by digging into the past.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: In this opening episode, we recount the life of Chinggis Khan, beginning with the dramatic struggles of his early years, including his familys fall from power, his survival against rival tribes, and his first alliances as a young warrior determined to rescue his kidnapped wife, Borte.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: Temujin enlists a childhood friend called Jamuqa. Their close friendship eventually turns into rivalry. Temujin is defeated and is forced to spend 10 years with the Jin Empire. When he returns, Temujin reasserts his position on the Mongolian plains and has subjugated all who oppose him, including his former allies. Temujin takes the title by which he will forever be known: Chinggis Khan.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: After taking the title of khan, Chinggis consolidated power by building a formidable army and eliminating rivals like the shaman Teb Tengri. Chinggis began his conquests with bold campaigns against the Tanguts and the Jin Empires, where brutal sieges of the city involved bold new military maneuvers, expanding the Mongol Empire to unprecedented heights.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: When a neighboring empire attacks a Mongol caravan, Chinggis Khan unleashes a devastating campaign that annihilates the empire and solidifies Mongol dominance across the lands of Persia. As his health declines, he names his son Ogedei as his successor and leads one final campaign against the neighboring Tanguts before his death, leaving behind an empire that spans continents.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: After Chinggis Khans secret burial, his son Ogedei is proclaimed ruler of the Mongol Empire. He brings a very different leadership style as he conquers Armenia, Georgia and the Jin Empire. He orders the building of the grand capital of Karakorum and sets the stage for a brutal campaign against Kievan Rus, led by his nephew Batu and the veteran general Subudai.

programme.title: Genghis Khan: The Secret History of the Mongols
programme.desc: The Mongolian Empire launched a devastating campaign through the lands of Russia and Europe, crushing knights with Mongol speed and strategy. As they prepared to push deeper into Europe, news of Ogedeis death halted the advance, triggering a struggle for succession over an empire that now stretched from China to Europe, the largest the world had ever seen.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: On the lands of their ancestors, Alaska Natives carry on tradition in a rapidly changing environment. Jody Potts-Joseph relies on the land to provide food, water, and warmth for her family. The Apassingnok family take any opportunity to gather food from the Bering Sea. Joel Jacko builds a cache to protect his winter food supply from the bears his family lives among. And Marvin Agnot relies on the tides to gather food for the people of his remote village.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: In Alaska, Native peoples have long secured resources from the land and sea for their survival. The Apassingoks take to the Bering Sea in search of marine animals to feed their village. Jody Potts-Joseph and her son Denali traverse the mountains on the hunt for caribou. The Jackos teach their daughter her first lessons in hunting. And Marvin Agnot takes his nephew Glyn on a hunt for ptarmigan.

programme.title: Primal Survivor: Escape the Amazon
programme.desc: Explorer Hazen Audel faces impenetrable rainforest as he begins a 500-mile survival challenge. In this first leg of his journey, he must escape to the edge of the forest before being trapped by the floods of the rainy season. With the help of the forests Wai Wai people, Hazen takes on lethal snakes, makes poisoned darts, and endures an agonising jungle ritual.

programme.title: Primal Survivor: Escape the Amazon
programme.desc: Survivalist Hazen Audel attempts to cross the open savannah in the second leg of his 500-mile Amazon challenge. He joins the native Wapishana cowboys in a desperate cattle-drive north, tackling giant anaconda, venomous rattlesnakes, and a treacherous river crossing as they attempt to escape the coming floods.

programme.title: Inside Melbourne Airport
programme.desc: Dangerous weapons concealed in luggage test airport security. Paramedics rush to treat a passenger suspected of having a stroke. A large group of VIPs require special attention, and a secret world beneath the terminals is revealed for the first time. Elsewhere, the hunt is on for the perfect aviation photograph.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Airport workers undertake true detective work to trace the owner of a duffel bag brimming with old family photos. A woman searches for Christmas decorations that are part of a family gifting tradition. In Tampa, the lost and found department donates items to a local womens shelter, including a $700 purse. In New Orleans, a young man loses his wallet upon arriving for a college tour.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Making a routine journey from Berlin, Crossair Flight #3597 is on its final approach to Zurich. It is one of the last planes scheduled to land. But just minutes before landing the pilots cannot find the runway. They decide to abort the maneuver and apply full power to all four engines in order to get their jet to climb. But they are too late. The aircraft clips the treetops below and crashes into a hillside. Investigators comb through the wreckage, and the data from the planes black boxes. But they would only solve the riddle of Crossair Flight 3597 by digging into the past.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Wild Mississippi
programme.desc: North Americas most famous waterway, the Mississippi River, is explored in this fantastic documentary series, focussing on the vast numbers of animals that depend on it for survival. With stunning cinematography that highlights its beauty and size, Wild Mississippi reveals the diverse climates and landscapes this enormous waterway covers, with its basin stretching for thousands of miles. A three-part series, each episode focusses on a unique aspect of the river, whether its the cold, frozen birth as it falls south from the northern states, the floods it causes, both beneficial and detrimental to animals and humans alike, as well as its negative effects, such as the masses of fertiliser it carries into the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europes astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Mountains. Europes mountains may offer incredible views, but they are rarely an easy place to live. Faced with rugged landscapes and extreme weather conditions, Europes high-altitude animals must either adapt... or die trying.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Europe is a continent of diversity, and its coasts are no exception. From the frozen Arctic Ocean, where polar bears and reindeer battle for survival, to the warm beaches of the Mediterranean, home to pink flamingos and killer corals, Europes coastline attracts a staggering array of wildlife. Its also the setting for some of the worlds most jaw-dropping natural spectacles, including orcas and humpback whales hunting side by side, and wild horses running free on the beaches of the Camargue.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: With leopards in its mountains, blue whales off its coasts, and foxes roaming its city centres, Europe is a continent full of wild surprises. From the frozen glaciers of Iceland to the lush islands of the Azores, and from the rugged peaks of the Caucasus to the metropolis of London, the first episode in this stunning series highlights Europes astonishing diversity, all shot with breath-taking brio and the latest technology to reveal the continent and its animals in all its breath-taking glory.

programme.title: Europes Wild Marvels
programme.desc: Mountains. Europes mountains may offer incredible views, but they are rarely an easy place to live. Faced with rugged landscapes and extreme weather conditions, Europes high-altitude animals must either adapt... or die trying.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. Africa is home to some of the most extreme and diverse environments on the planet, from arid deserts to lush rainforests, mountainous peaks to mighty river and lake systems, savannah grasslands to rugged coastline. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Trials of the Wild
programme.desc: Watch a range of wild animals trying to survive in the wilderness as they migrate, hunt and defend themselves against predators and the dangers that are living alongside them. Follow animals born to fight to those designed to live in the canopy of trees as the series gives you an insight into natures greatest spectacles from around the world on land, water and air. This nature documentary is intriguing and engaging as they examine a range of species and how they survive in the most brutal environments.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: This stunning six-part nature series tells the inspiring story of the rebirthing of the wild regions of the continent of Europe. A land formerly full of diverse wildlife and contrasting landscapes, Europe was in need of special rewilding teams to embark on a mission to return species to their natural habitat and this series focuses on six regions that have benefitted from the project. The Carpathian Mountains of Romania have seen the reintroduction of European bison while rural depopulation in Spain and Portugal offers up the opportunity to expand the wild nature of the Iberian Peninsula. The teams also look at how bears and humans can live peacefully, side by side and explores the myriad creatures that call the Danube Delta home. The unique culture and atmosphere of Lapland plays host to distinctive wildlife and the Sámi people and a natural balance is being restored to the Balkans.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. Africa is home to some of the most extreme and diverse environments on the planet, from arid deserts to lush rainforests, mountainous peaks to mighty river and lake systems, savannah grasslands to rugged coastline. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: Reality show follows Dutch-born veterinarian Jan Pol, his family and employees everyday. Jan Pol and his wife Diane started their own practice in Weidman, Michigan, Pol Veterinary Services, back in in 1981. Dr Pol takes a good care of every family pet and head of livestock no matter what size or condition and is a true legend in the community. Dr Pol has seen it all, treating numerous patients every single day, his daily routine is more than 12 hours but nothing can stop him from being devoted to his patients.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds assembles "The Superzeros", a team of somewhat pitiful animals with unexpectedly awesome superpowers.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Terrible Parents. Ryan Reynolds reveals some highly questionable parenting strategies from the animal kingdoms worst parents, the underdogs, from a goose who lays their eggs on the top of a cliff to a koala that feeds its baby poop.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds puts the spotlight on the underdogs who get ahead by sneaky tactics.

The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Europes New Wild
programme.desc: This stunning six-part nature series tells the inspiring story of the rebirthing of the wild regions of the continent of Europe. A land formerly full of diverse wildlife and contrasting landscapes, Europe was in need of special rewilding teams to embark on a mission to return species to their natural habitat and this series focuses on six regions that have benefitted from the project. The Carpathian Mountains of Romania have seen the reintroduction of European bison while rural depopulation in Spain and Portugal offers up the opportunity to expand the wild nature of the Iberian Peninsula. The teams also look at how bears and humans can live peacefully, side by side and explores the myriad creatures that call the Danube Delta home. The unique culture and atmosphere of Lapland plays host to distinctive wildlife and the Sámi people and a natural balance is being restored to the Balkans.

programme.title: Mashatu: Land of Leopards
programme.desc: In Botswanas Mashatu Game Reserve, one of the last sanctuaries for free-roaming leopards, a mother gives birth to two cubs. Shell stop at nothing to protect them. But as climate change tightens its grip, resources dwindle, and a fierce leopard war looms. Over three years of intimate observation, this film unveils rare, breathtaking footage of behaviors never before documented, offering an unprecedented glimpse into the resilience and secrets of this elusive species.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: Its winter on the farm, and the Pols are adding to their flock! The family is bringing in four merino ewes that were recently bred, which means with any luck the farm could be expecting its first lambs come springtime. And as winter fades into spring, the Pols prepare for the new arrivals by building a lambing pen. Meanwhile, Beth checks if her bees survived the winter.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols rush to prepare for their farms first Michigan winter. The family goes into hyperdrive to fix the pasture fence and finish building the garden hardscape before the first snow falls. Beth is worried about the bees, so she brings in some expert help to hopefully ensure their survival.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Black mambas are one of the most feared snakes on the planet. But behind the twitchy demeanour and lightning-fast strike is a shy and highly intelligent creature, just trying to get through the hot, snakey summer alive.

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Terrible Parents. Ryan Reynolds reveals some highly questionable parenting strategies from the animal kingdoms worst parents, the underdogs, from a goose who lays their eggs on the top of a cliff to a koala that feeds its baby poop.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom: Clash of Clans Compilations
programme.desc: Pula, the leopard ruler of the dark heart of the kingdom, faces a tough choice between her true love and her legacy. When Pula gives birth to Motshidi, it is her last chance at a dynasty. Blue Eyes, Motshidis father, cannot be trusted. He has been known to kill younglings. Pula must protect and train Motshidi to take her rightful place in the kingdom as Pulas health weakens.

programme.title: Legends of Venom

programme.title: Underdogs
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds puts the spotlight on the underdogs who get ahead by sneaky tactics.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: Reality show follows Dutch-born veterinarian Jan Pol, his family and employees everyday. Jan Pol and his wife Diane started their own practice in Weidman, Michigan, Pol Veterinary Services, back in in 1981. Dr Pol takes a good care of every family pet and head of livestock no matter what size or condition and is a true legend in the community. Dr Pol has seen it all, treating numerous patients every single day, his daily routine is more than 12 hours but nothing can stop him from being devoted to his patients.

programme.title: Serpents Surprise
programme.desc: National Geographic Wild. Snakes are awesome, complex predators with dramatic behavior and cunning skills. And, they are more useful to people than you might think.

programme.title: Secrets of the King Cobra
programme.desc: .King cobras are the largest venomous snakes on earth, growing to more than five meters in length, and their venomous bite is powerful enough to kill an adult elephant. a new scientific expedition is preparing to follow the king in nature for the first time ever, revealing the truth behind the life of an animal we think we know.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Black mambas are one of the most feared snakes on the planet. But behind the twitchy demeanour and lightning-fast strike is a shy and highly intelligent creature, just trying to get through the hot, snakey summer alive.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Vipers rule deserts and haunt the forest floor. Meet a snake family as diverse as the challenges they face in their quest for survival.

programme.title: Legends of Venom
programme.desc: Cobra. Charmed by some, feared by most, the cobra family is powerful and iconic. From giant cannibalistic king cobras in India to desert specialists that hunt birds in the Kalahari and semi aquatic Forest cobras stalking toads in African swamps.

programme.title: The Hidden World of Snakes
programme.desc: Since ancient times, humans have had tangled bonds with snakes. Across the Americas and Australia, diverse habitats host venomous vipers and powerful constrictors, each evolved to fill their niche. In the Americas, over 30 rattlesnake species curb rodent populations, sustaining ecosystems. Meanwhile, Australias coral reefs hide even deadlier sea snakes and the elusive, extremely venomous coastal taipan. From lush forests to desert sands and ocean depths, these continents harbor a hidden world of some of the most lethal, fascinating and secretive serpents.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes with Nigel Marven
programme.desc: British author, television presenter and wildlife expert, Nigel Marven, travels the world to find the deadliest species of snake. In each episode Marven travels to a new country or continent and reveals the top 10 deadliest snakes that inhabit that region. From Costa Ricas black-headed bushmaster to South Africas infamous black mamba, Chinas king cobra to Mexicos terciopelo, we uncover the most dangerous snakes on our planet. Known for his bold and impulsive approach to animals in the wild, Marven must be on full alert, as a bite from these slithering serpents could paralyse or even kill him.

programme.title: Worlds Deadliest Snakes
programme.desc: Some strike without warning. Others move at blinding speed or attack in ways you never thought possible. Each possesses a special tactic that makes it a prime predator. Hidden weapons and startling skills. So watch out as the secret of snakes are revealed.

programme.title: Built to Survive
programme.desc: Indigenous educator Phil Breslin heads to the mysterious blue depths to discover which animal dominates the sea. His first encounter is with a tiger shark, the notorious hunter shaped like a torpedo and armed with ferocious teeth! Next, Phil dives with a group of magnificent manta rays and listens to the songs of one of the largest creatures on Earth, the majestic humpback whale.

programme.title: Mashatu: Land of Leopards
programme.desc: In Botswanas Mashatu Game Reserve, one of the last sanctuaries for free-roaming leopards, a mother gives birth to two cubs. Shell stop at nothing to protect them. But as climate change tightens its grip, resources dwindle, and a fierce leopard war looms. programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls un suņi atrod vectēva Grants laimīgi boulinga bumbu. Diemžēl Celtnieklīcī nav boulinga zāles... līdz šim!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Doras palīdzību lūdz košā alebrihe Ale. Alebrihu koks ir novītis, tāpēc Dorai jādodas meklēt varavīksnes ūdens. Karstā dienā visi ilgojas pēc saldējuma, bet Valas furgons ir iestidzis smiltīs! Dora iet palīgā, lai visi tiktu pie aukstā našķa.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kamēr ģimene veido keramikas izstrādājumus, Barbabravo un Barbagudrais mēģina uzstādīt pasaules rekordu ar siera suflē. Barbapapas nolemj doties uz parku. Kamēr brālis un māsa spēlējas, Barbaliba mēģina visu kontrolēt.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Sekojot iemīļotā detektīva pēdās, Barbabravo meklē noziegumu, kas jāatklāj. Vai viņš spēs atklāt noslēpumaino ledus skulptūras pazušanu? Barbabērni gatavo savu mīļāko varoņu iedvesmotus tērpus, taču varoņi neeksistē bez ļaundariem...

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni laimē skārienpaliktni. Visi grab to izmantot, tāpēc čiepj viens pēc otra. Barbazū krāj ūsainu slavenību bildes. Diemžēl nekur nevar atrast pēdējo: Čārlzu Pakavu-Ūsaini. Viņam ir aizdomas par sazvērestību...

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabo aizmirsa nodot bibliotēkas grāmatu. Bibliotekārs Misters Stingrais šodien ciemojas pie Barbatēta, tāpēc Barbabo izlemj aizbēgt. Barbamamma grib, lai barbabērni uzkopj savas istabas. Viņi slēpjas, lai izvairītos no garlaicīgā darba.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda strādā, lai pārvērstu Celtnieklīča pludmales promenādi spožā, svinīgā ziemas brīnumzemē. Kad sniegota diena izjauc Motores un Miksas Virpuļvāveres plānus, Rabla komanda dara to, ko prot vislabāk... būvē.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī tiek uzbūvēta pirmā viesnīca, kad ciemos atbrauc fermeres Zojas brālēns Hedlijs. Kad juceklis uz dabas takas apmulsina visus Dakija Dū kunga dzimšanas dienas ballītes viesus, ķepaiņi viņiem palīdz atrast ceļu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala saņem paciņu ar rozā zvēriņiem, ko nosauc par Skvīkijiem. Barbabravo, Barbalala un Barbabo ir apnicis, ka brāļi un māsas par viņiem smejas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Dvīņi ciemojas Barbagudrā istabā. Kādus sapņus sasniegtu, ja es būtu miljardieris?

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims nolemj pierādīt, ka Kajas tētis ir kapteinis Dinostārs. Tims cenšas atpūsties, bet Tijai ir citi plāni. Tims nopērk labākos cepumus pilsētā, bet drīz saprot, ka citiem tos vajag vairāk nekā viņam.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls ar komandu pārvācas uz Celtnieklīci, kur viņi dzīvo, spēlējas un būvē visu, kas vien nepieciešams.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls ar komandu pārvācas uz Celtnieklīci, kur viņi dzīvo, spēlējas un būvē visu, kas vien nepieciešams.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vērojot zvaignzes Barbatētis un Lolita pamana lidojošo šķivīti un steidz pamodināt visu ģimeni. Izrādās, ka ciemos atlidojuši draugi, kuriem līdzi ir lielkājains mazulis, kurš pēkšņi uzradās viņu planētā. Ģimene ar kosmosa kuģi dodas mazuļa planētas meklējumos. // Barbatētis cer, ka viņi drīz atradīs mazuļa planētu. Bet ne viss iet pēc plāna un viņi nolaižas uz ļoti dīvainas planētas. Kā viņi tiks prom un vai atradīs mazuļa planētu?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērniem ir garlaicīgi, jo ārā līst lietus. Bet vecāki zina, ka vajag tikai nedaudz iztēles, lai varētu izklaidēties aŗī lietū. Bērniem iztēle ir lieliska, varbūt pat pārāk... // Barbagudrais radīja dekoderi, kurš spēj iztulkot dzīvnieku skaņas, bet dzīvnieki fermā un pagalmā neko interesantu nesaka. Barbazū lūdz iztulkot okeāna iemītnieku valodu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims dara visu, lai tiktu pie jaunās Dinozvaigznes figūriņas. Ir Astro-joku diena, bet Tims nezina, kad apstāties. Timam un tētim jānoķer traucējošs kurmis.

programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī apmetas migrējošu pīļu bars. Rabla komandai jāpalīdz pīlēm uzsākt ceļu uz dienvidiem. Motore nevēlas doties pie dakteres Divas uz veterināro klīniku... tāpēc ķepaiņi uzbūvē īpašu, tikai viņai paredzētu telpu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Vēl jautrāk kopā ar DORU! Pievienojieties mazajai pētniecei un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam brīnišķīgos ceļojumos pa lietusmežu, kur gaida lieliski piedzīvojumi un tikšanās ar jauniem un veciem draugiem.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims nolemj pierādīt, ka Kajas tētis ir kapteinis Dinostārs.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims cenšas atpūsties, bet Tijai ir citi plāni.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims nopērk labākos cepumus pilsētā, bet drīz saprot, ka citiem tos vajag vairāk nekā viņam.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmsskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Pepa dodas uz zebras Zojas pidžamu ballīti kopā ar aitiņu Sūziju, trusīti Rebeku, kaķenīti Kendiju un zilonīti Emīliju. Meitenes spēlē spēles un izklaidējas. Beidzot viņām uznāk miegs. Viņas iekārtojas guļammaisos un aizmieg.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
